extra_descs.desc: It's small, it's red, it's a key.

long_desc: A small red key has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: The brass key seems worn through years of use.

long_desc: An worn brass key lies idlely on the ground here.

extra_descs.desc: It isn't a pretty sight.  You could not bring yourself to eat this!

Oreo is a registered trademark of Christie Brown & Co.  A division of Nabisco
Brands Ltd.

long_desc: A moldy, dust covered Oreo(tm) cookie has been discarded here.

extra_descs.desc: It has a 'W3625' insribed on it.

long_desc: A small iron key hangs from a hook here.

extra_descs.desc: It has a 'W2716' insribed on it.

long_desc: A small iron key lies on a desk here.

extra_descs.desc: It's not steak!

long_desc: A tray of Mary Rotte salisbury steak has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: You've never seen anything more disgusting in your life.

long_desc: A Mary Rotte garden burger lies here, lonely.

extra_descs.desc: You're not sure, but you think that they are plastic.

long_desc: Some Mary Rotte fried eggs sit here slowly hardening.

extra_descs.desc: What is lyonnaise, anyways?

long_desc: A dish of Mary Rotte lyonnaise potatoes wobbles around here.

extra_descs.desc: It's similar to a pizza pop.  It looks vaguely edible.

long_desc: A Mary Rotte calzone cools here.

extra_descs.desc: They look heavy.

long_desc: A HUGE set of barbells lies here, gathering dust.

extra_descs.desc: One of the old type...  The ones they give away for free.

long_desc: A condom has been carefully placed here.

extra_descs.desc: This tam is real ugly.  I mean ugly.

long_desc: A tam is here...

extra_descs.desc:
You can't believe you actually found one.  Blue trays are almost as common as
talking dogs that speak in Norwegian!

long_desc: No it couldn't be... a blue tray!

extra_descs.desc: This thing (blech) must be glowing from the radiation...

long_desc: A hairnet has been thrown away here.

extra_descs.desc: This looks like one of the flashlights Security uses...  Uh-oh...

long_desc: A long flashlight has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc: This nice, yellow jacket has the word STU-CON emblazoned on the back.

long_desc: A nice yellow jacket has been carefully hung here.

extra_descs.desc: This is an evil knife, pure and simple.

long_desc: An evil knife lies on the ground here.

extra_descs.desc: This small key has only one marking on it, the number BF128.

long_desc: A small silver key lies forgotten here.

extra_descs.desc: This brass key is marked with the number HG34.

long_desc: A small brass key lies forgotten here.

extra_descs.desc:
The blade has a dark aura surrounding it.  It seems to absorb any light that
dares to stray near it.

long_desc: A dark, incredibly sharp blade lies on the ground here.
A dark brown-to-black cloak has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: It's shape is very peculiar.  It seems to have a glowing aura.

long_desc: An oddly shaped sword lies here.

extra_descs.desc: This Orb looks distinctly evil.

long_desc: An Obsidian orb is emoting darkness here.

extra_descs.desc:
This gold leather jacket looks rather beaten up, but it still looks like it
will last forever.  You can see a crest of sorts on the left breast.
The crest seems to portray the numbers 9 and 7.

long_desc: A beautiful Golden jacket has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: This hat is covered with fur and has rather nice ear-flaps.

long_desc: An extremely Furry Hat has been carefully hung on the wall here.

extra_descs.desc: This pair of boots is well worn.

long_desc: A pair of boots has been left here.
short_desc: an old pair of work boots

extra_descs.desc: It's shiny, it's silver ...  What more could you want?

long_desc: A nice, shiny, silver vest has been lost here.

extra_descs.desc:
This nice, silver hairbrush is a bit tarnished but still suffices to untangle
hair.

long_desc: A silver object has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
The extension cord was probably made by the twin power-mages Black and Decker
and seems to stretch off to the horizon.

long_desc: A long extension cord stretches to the north and south.

extra_descs.desc:
The extension cord was probably made by the twin power-mages Black and Decker
and leads off into the street.  Wonder where it leads?

long_desc: A cord comes in from the street and is plugged in an outlet to the east.

extra_descs.desc:
The extension cord was probably made by the twin power-mages Black and Decker
and seems to stretch off to the northern horizon.

long_desc: An cord comes from the back of the Coke Machine and stretches to the north.

extra_descs.desc:
The extension cord was probably made by the twin power-mages Black and Decker
and seems to stretch off to the southern horizon and into the building which
just happens to lie to the east.

long_desc: A long extension cord stretches to the south and into a building to the east.

extra_descs.desc:
World of Xeen is a registered trademark of New World Computing.  As are the
Might & Magic games (IV and V).

This game is a combination of Might & Magic IV and V (tm) and takes up a lot
of hard drive space.  Almost 42 megabytes in fact!

long_desc: The World of Xeen(tm) game is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc: Looks almost like your generic long sword, but not quite.

long_desc: An ordinary long sword gathers dust here.

extra_descs.desc: This T-square is an extremely sharp weapon, and has been well used.

long_desc: A T-square has been carelessly discarded here.

extra_descs.desc: It looks like it didn't get enough sun.

long_desc: An extremely pale apple sits here.

extra_descs.desc: This bottle has such greenish glass that you can't see if anything is inside.

long_desc: A bottle with a brightly colored label sits here.

extra_descs.desc: The wooden carafe seems to be some sort of container.

long_desc: A wooden carafe sits on a table here.

extra_descs.desc: This small glass looks like it would be emptied in a drink or two.

long_desc: A shotglass has been discarded here.

extra_descs.desc:
This can is elegantly decorated with garish colors that almost make you
sick.  They were probably intended to have a similar effect to the drink inside.

long_desc: A can of PopCoke awaits you here, cool and refreshing.

extra_descs.desc:
This candy is made of the highest standard of chocolate.  It even meets the
standards of the Candy Man.

long_desc: A candy bar is here!

extra_descs.desc: This large, steel key is very ordinary.

long_desc: A large steel key lies hidden here.

extra_descs.desc:
It looks like the student humor newspaper, but it contains nothing to do
with actual news that you didn't know already.

long_desc: A copy of Golden World lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
It seems to have water in it and it reminds you of one of the water bottles
used in hamster's cages.

long_desc: A large Water Bottle stands in the corner.

extra_descs.desc:
This key is an effective master of the art of uselessness...  You wonder why
it is even here.

long_desc: A key elusively lies quite convincingly.

extra_descs.desc:
The computer is turned on and on the screen you can see:

0) Exit from DikuMud.
1) Enter the game.
2) Enter description.
3) Change password.
5) Read History.

   Make your choice:

long_desc: A computer sits quietly in the corner.

extra_descs.desc:
This looks like it was postdated a loooong time ago.  Wonder why it hasn't
been delivered.

long_desc: A letter lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
This piece of mail has been stamped and dropped into the mailbox and is
presently awaiting delivery.

long_desc: A piece of mail is here.

extra_descs.desc:
This parcel has been wrapped with brown paper and sealed with Duct Tape.
Looks like it's never getting opened again.

long_desc: A large parcel stands here.

extra_descs.desc: Darn!  It seems to be broken.

long_desc: A milk dispenser sits at the back of the auditorium.

extra_descs.desc: Hey!  It's got that cool picture from those commercials!

long_desc: A cool carton of refreshing milk catches your eye.

extra_descs.desc: Hey!  It's got that cool picture from those commercials too!

long_desc: A cool carton of refreshing milk catches your eye.

long_desc: A handy-dandy map of the campus is standing here.

extra_descs.desc:
This key is extremely ghostly, and you fear to put it down as you might not
be able to find it again.

long_desc: You can see through an object resembling a key.
.A hidden nothing.

extra_descs.desc:
A small plaque on the base reads: This pendulum was donated by the Class of
'67 Of course....  You do have a little trouble reading this as the pendulum
swings inches from your head.

long_desc: A large pendulum swings here.

extra_descs.desc: You can tell it is firmly attached simply by pulling on it.

long_desc: A drinking fountain is firmly attached to the wall here.

extra_descs.desc: This is your average, every day, run-of-the-mill, wooden chest.

long_desc: There is a wooden chest here.

extra_descs.desc:
This book is filled with numbers, dates, and strange notation.  It is enough
to put anyone to sleep.

long_desc: A large book with the word "Ledger" written on it has been forgotten here.

extra_descs.desc: This is your average, every day, run-of-the-mill, wooden chest.

long_desc: There is a wooden chest here.

extra_descs.desc: This bag of coins doesn't look too big.

long_desc: A small bag filled with coins lies here.
